title: Create: Tutorial books
description: A mod that adds books for beginners of Create
body:
## This mod introduces a series of in-game books that break down the intricate mechanics of the Create mod into easy-to-follow steps. 
Right now I have support for Create Crafts & Additions showing simple ways to make FE.
I will update and revise these books with more info and fun pictures. 
## You can make the books by checking out the crafting recipes down below or with JEI

<details>
<summary>Recipes</summary>
  
Vol1  
  ![vol1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/424037b110f69a941fc8cc29426f85bdcd5282cc.png)  
 Vol2  
  ![Vol2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03551b652ec74bdad26ddf8b6f6b373e8a63c91f.png)  
  Vol3  
  ![Vol3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ca6e1dfb7e44792995c2c52aaeeb29ce86c2a60.png)         
    Vol4  
  ![Vol4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/edbe01d8659e6ad6ab9f48f379f159e07b5760ff.png) 
  
  
</details>


## I plan on supporting many mods and furture verisons of Minecraft
- Create: NewAge (Half Done)
- Steam 'n' Rails
- Big Cannons
- Diesel Generators (WIP)
- Armory
- The Factory Must Grow
- Crafts & Additions(Done)
- Loads of more books
- etc ideas and stuff.


I am planning on relasing this mod for fabric and more verison of forge. 
Just got to figure that out tho


This is my first mod and I have to admit _(It's made with MCcreator)_ **BUT** I dont want it to be crappy. 
I hope you enjoy this mod, if you have any ideas/features find the GitHub page with a thing to do.


**This was created for my brother.**
